hero.tag: Setting the Standard for Plastic Product Excellence
hero.title: Premium UV Coating & Vacuum Metallizing Solutions
hero.description: We specialize in advanced UV coating and vacuum metallizing services for plastic products. With nearly three decades of industry expertise, we deliver premium finishes that elevate your brand and protect your products.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded in 1996 in Jakarta, PT. Starpack Indahmaju has established itself as a leading provider of UV coating and vacuum metallizing solutions for plastic products. What started as a small operation has grown into a trusted partner for over 500 clients across multiple industries.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide innovative coating solutions that enhance product aesthetics, durability, and market appeal while maintaining the highest standards of quality and environmental responsibility.

tech.title: Advanced Technology & Machinery
tech.description: Our state-of-the-art facilities feature the latest in UV coating and vacuum metallizing technology, ensuring precision, consistency, and scalability in every production run.

categories.title: UV Coating Technology
items: Advanced UV light curing systems for instant hardening
Precision spray and roller coating equipment

categories.title: Vacuum Metallizing Technology
items: Industrial-grade vacuum chambers for metal deposition
Precise aluminum and chrome coating capabilities
Multi-layer coating systems for enhanced effects

gallery.title: UV Curing Systems
gallery.desc: Precision equipment for instant hardening and premium finishes

gallery.title: Vacuum Metallizing
gallery.desc: Advanced chambers for professional metal deposition

effects.title: Premium Coating Effects
effects.description: We offer a comprehensive range of coating finishes tailored to your specific application and market requirements. Each effect is engineered for durability and visual excellence.

items.title: High Gloss
items.desc: Mirror-like finish for premium luxury products

items.title: Metallic Silver
items.desc: Premium silver coating with depth and shimmer

items.title: Gold Chrome
items.desc: Luxurious gold metallic finish for high-end products

items.title: Holographic
items.desc: Rainbow iridescent effect with light-reactive finish

items.title: Pearl Effect
items.desc: Subtle, sophisticated pearl coating for elegance

industry.title: Industry We Serve
industry.description: Our UV plastic coating support products across multiple industries.
industry.footer: We help production teams achieve consistent finishing results for recurring manufacturing.

quality.title: Quality & Certification
quality.description: Quality-driven manufacturing with structured controls and certification alignment.

iso.title: ISO 9001:2015
iso.text: PT. Starpack Indahmaju is ISO 9001:2015 certified (upgraded April 2022).
items: Process consistency for reliable coating outcomes
Operational control aligned with quality objectives

standards.title: Quality Standards
items: Inspection to support stable product appearance across runs
Production planning for scalable manufacturing delivery
